title: Croatian Wrap Delight
description: A flavorful Croatian-inspired wrap filled with caramelized onions and crispy croatian ingredients. Perfect for a quick snack or light meal.
instructions: Heat 1 tbsp of olive oil in a pan over medium heat.
Add the chopped croatian and sauté for 3-4 minutes until lightly browned.
Add the caramelized onion and stir to combine.
Warm the crisp wraps by wrapping them in a damp paper towel and microwaving for 20-30 seconds.
Assemble the wraps by spooning the croatian and onion mixture onto the center of each wrap.
Drizzle with the remaining 1 tbsp of olive oil and serve immediately.
